name: sakura-crest-social-summit
description: A family-friendly 2D anime high-school social simulation with social-status difficulty and club progression.

scripts.serve: npm run build && python3 -m http.server 4173 --directory dist
scripts.check: npm run assets:generate && npm run syntax && npm run validate:content && npm run validate:assets && npm run test:unit && npm run build && npm run test:smoke && npm run verify:release && npm run test:http
